title: Device Settings - Pair Headset with Charge Stand
scenario: Charge Stand pairing and charging icon display persists after removing headset, restarting device, and restarting app
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Pair the headset with the app via the Home screen (if not already paired).
3. Ensure the headset is NOT yet paired with a Charge Stand.
4. Place the headset onto the Charge Stand.
5. Observe the Home screen of the app for a charging icon on the device card.
6. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Software Update.
7. Verify that Charge Stand information is displayed in the Software Update screen.
8. Remove the headset from the Charge Stand.
9. Check that the Charge Stand information still appears in Device Settings → Software Update.
11. Re-open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → Software Update.
12. Verify that the Charge Stand information is still present.
13. Restart the Poly Studio Mobile app (force close and reopen).
14. Navigate again to Device Settings → Software Update.
15. Verify that the Charge Stand information persists.
expected: A charging icon appears on the device home screen when the headset is placed on the Charge Stand. Charge Stand information appears in Device Settings > Software Update and persists after removing the headset from the stand, restarting the device, and restarting the app.
